option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import java.lang.*?> <?import java.util.*?> <?import javafx.scene.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="CONTROLLER_NAME" prefHeight="400.0" prefWidth="600.0">
</AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<VBox xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="com.auction.controller.NotificationController" spacing="15" prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="800.0" style="-fx-background-color: white;">
<padding> <Insets top="20" right="30" bottom="20" left="30"/> </padding>
<!-- Header with Back Button and Title --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="15"> <Button fx:id="backButton" text="<" style="-fx-font-size: 24px; -fx-padding: 5 10; -fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #888; -fx-cursor: hand;" onAction="#handleBackButton"/> <Label text="Thông báo" style="-fx-font-size: 28px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </HBox>
<!-- Notifications List --> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-border-color: transparent; -fx-padding: 0;"> <VBox fx:id="notificationContainer" spacing="12" style="-fx-padding: 10;"> <!-- Sample Notification Item 1 --> <HBox spacing="15" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" style="-fx-background-color: #F5F5F5; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 15;"> <Label text="Xác thực giao dịch: SP01 - Auction Item 01 - Giá tiền: 1.725.000VND" style="-fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-text-fill: #333; -fx-wrap-text: true;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <Button style="-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-padding: 8; -fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #00C853; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="✓" onAction="#handleAcceptNotification"/> <Button style="-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-padding: 8; -fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #FF0000; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="✕" onAction="#handleRejectNotification"/> <Button style="-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-padding: 8; -fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #1565C0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="⋯" onAction="#handleMoreOptions"/> </HBox> </HBox>
<!-- Sample Notification Item 2 --> <HBox spacing="15" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" style="-fx-background-color: #F5F5F5; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 15;"> <Label text="Sản phẩm đấu giá thành công: SP17 - Auction Item 17 - Giá tiền: 1..." style="-fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-text-fill: #333; -fx-wrap-text: true;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <Button style="-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-padding: 8; -fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #FF0000; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="" onAction="#handleDeleteNotification"/> <Button style="-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-padding: 8; -fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #1565C0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="⋯" onAction="#handleMoreOptions"/> </HBox> </HBox> </VBox> </ScrollPane>
<!-- Spacer --> <VBox VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
